# inset

## Plugin reference

- Description: Inset sidebar framing — the main area floats as a rounded inset card.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `SidebarFraming.Variant` "Inset" → `InsetFraming`
  - Uses: `ui/sidebar-framing.SidebarFraming`
